title: PID Heater Control Lab Module
description: An IoT-based smart irrigation system developed using an ESP32 microcontroller to monitor soil moisture levels in real-time. It features automated watering control via a relay-driven pump, with data visualized on an IoT Dashboard for remote monitoring.
